channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Ukraine’s fight against Russia is going better than you might think - vox.com
item.description:

  3. A revolution in warfare is happening right now — and not in Iran  MS NOW
  4. The Ukrainian Miracle  The Weekly Dish | Andrew Sullivan
  5. Ukraine: Fighting back, without the U.S.  theweek.com

item.title: Say Goodbye to the Panama Canal: A New Ocean-to-Ocean Route Just Shipped 900 Vehicles in Just 72 Hours - Indian Defence Review

item.title: This High-Altitude Cave Drew Humans for Thousands of Years—and These Green Rocks Explain Why - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. This High-Altitude Cave Drew Humans for Thousands of Years—and These Green Rocks Explain Why  Gizmodo
  2. 6,000 years of human occupation found in highest prehistoric cave in Spain’s Pyrenees  Archaeology News Online Magazine
  3. Prehistoric child’s finger bone, bear tooth pendant, and more discovered in Spanish cave  Popular Science
  4. 6,000-Year-Old Prehistoric Mining Camp Discovered Amid Burned Rocks and Children’s Bones  The Debrief
  5. Burned stone, child's bones, and lost jewelry hint at prehistoric mining camp high in the Pyrenees  Phys.org
